rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assume/guarantee syntax for component type contracts, assign for implementation-level bindings
generic_rules: Refer to component ports only through valid variables or outputs in component type contracts
Use visible identifiers and named constants when defining bounds or relations in AGREE contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are available
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Implementation contracts use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
